name: Dasi Library Manager
author: Poki
description: Dasi Library Manager is a simulation game where you can create the library of your dreams! Create a cozy environment for your customers to read their favorite books, clean up tables, and organize books back on the shelves. Use your earnings to upgrade your library—unlock new shelves, add more tables, and expand the map to welcome even more visitors. Can you manage it all and become the ultimate library manager? How to play Dasi Library Manager? Use the arrow keys, WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Dasi Library Manager? Dasi Library Manager is created by Dasi Games. Check out their other games on Poki: Office Manager and Dasi Hospital Manager ! How can I play Dasi Library Manager for free? You can play Dasi Library Manager for free on Poki. Can I play Dasi Library Manager on mobile devices and desktop? Dasi Library Manager can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
